CONTENT.Career: A youth product of Paris Saint-Germain, Appuah transferred to FC Nantes on 20 May 2021, signing a three-year contract. He began his senior career with the reserves of Nantes in 2022, before being promoted to their senior side in March 2023. He made his professional debut with Nantes as a late substitute in a 2–2 Ligue 1 tie with OGC Nice on 12 March 2023, assisting his sides second goal.On 7 August 2024, Italian Serie B club Palermo announced the signing of Appuah on a five-year contract.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in Paris, France, Appuah is of Ghanaian descent. He holds both French and British nationalities.

SUMMARY: Stredair Appuah (born 27 June 2004) is a French professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Italian Serie B club Palermo.
